feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: World Cup Round of 16 bracket: Updated schedule, results for second 2026 FIFA knockout round
entry.content: Here's a look at the Round of 16 bracket for the 2026 World Cup, with full schedule and results.

entry.title: Macquarie says now is the 'best time' to buy Chinese AI chip stocks. This one's its favorite
entry.content: Macquarie began research coverage of five Chinese companies making chips for artificial intelligence applications.

entry.title: The State of ESG Investing: How Dire Is It?
entry.content: Investors have pulled billions, funds have closed and proxy voting is down. But proponents say the strategy remains viable, even if it’s pursued more quietly.

entry.title: Millions Pour Into Tehran to Mourn Late Supreme Leader
entry.content: Mourners are filling the streets of Tehran as part of a days-long memorial for Iran’s former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the first strikes of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for Sunday TODAY.

entry.title: Novak Djokovic next match at Wimbledon 2026: TV schedule, scores, results for tennis grand slam
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Novak Djokovic's next appearance at Wimbledon, including TV channel and streaming options for the match.

entry.title: Coco Gauff next match at Wimbledon 2026: TV schedule, scores, results for tennis grand slam
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Coco Gauff's next appearance at Wimbledon, including TV channel and streaming options for the match.

entry.title: Taylor Fritz next match at Wimbledon 2026: TV schedule, scores, results for tennis grand slam
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Taylor Fritz's next appearance at Wimbledon, including TV channel and streaming options for the match.

entry.title: Where to watch Mexico vs. England live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 16 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Mexico vs. England World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Kylian Mbappe next World Cup match: Fixture schedule, start time, draw bracket as France face Morocco in quarterfinals
entry.content: Is Kylian Mbappe playing today? The Real Madrid star returns to his favorite stage this summer, with France once again among the leading contenders for glory at the 2026 World Cup.

entry.title: France next World Cup match: Fixture schedule, start time, draw bracket as Les Blues face Morocco in quarterfinals
entry.content: France's World Cup schedule: Les Bleus' next game at the 2026 tournament as Didier Deschamps plots a route to a third straight final.

entry.title: USA next World Cup match: Schedule, start time, draw bracket and results as USMNT face Belgium in R16
entry.content: The U.S. men's national team will embark on a journey never seen before by soccer fans in this country as they play co-host to the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

entry.title: OPEC, Allies Hike Output Again as Hormuz Traffic Starts Recovering
entry.content: The fifth consecutive increase comes as the cartel continues to unwind production cuts introduced in recent years.

entry.title: Matheus Cunha goal celebration, explained: How Olympic gold medalist inspired Brazil star's surfing celly
entry.content: The Brazilian star's signature goal celebration is loved by fans of Manchester United and the Brazilian national team. But where did it come from?

entry.title: Azam replaces Masood as Pakistan's Test captain
entry.content: Babar Azam is reinstated as Pakistan's Test captain before the upcoming tours of the West Indies and England.

entry.title: Former Texas A&M star pitcher earns second career All-Star selection
entry.content: Former Texas A&M and current Kansas City star pitcher Michael Wacha earned his second career All-Star Game on Saturday.

entry.title: Fans frustrated by more Columbus Blue Jackets bad news
entry.content: Readers share frustrations over Blue Jackets roster moves, the World Cup, Tiger Woods and MLB All-Star voting in this week's mail.

entry.title: NATO Is Fixing Its Cash Flow Problem. Now It Needs to Turn Money Into Munitions.
entry.content: Mark Rutte said defense contractors are trying to keep pace with demand as members pump up spending.

entry.title: Liquor Stocks Are Priced for a Big Tobacco Moment
entry.content: Declines in drinking are hurting distillers’ shares, but has the selloff gone too far?

entry.title: Napoli ready to reward McTominay with pay rise despite World Cup disappointment
entry.content: La Gazzetta dello Sport reports that Napoli are prepared to make Scott McTominay one of the team’s highest earners despite a disappointing World Cup with the Scotland national team.Napoli are ready...

entry.title: New Richard Hughes to Al-Hilal timeline emerges as sporting director expected to leave
entry.content: Richard Hughes has been a major player in Liverpool’s post-Jurgen Klopp operations.The former Bournemouth technical director was headhunted by FSG CEO of Football Michael Edwards to become Liverpool...

entry.title: England enter the Azteca - where football kings are crowned
entry.content: BBC sport explores the history and cultural power of the Azteca, one of the great cathedrals of world football, as England prepare to face Mexico there in the last 16 of the World Cup.

entry.title: Swiss World Cup team hit by wave of hate comments online
entry.content: Switzerland players are increasingly facing hateful comments on social media during the World Cup. "Unfortunately, we can now estimate when the risk of a build-up of such despicable comments increases," a team spokesman told news agency Keystone-SDA.

entry.title: Naomi Osaka’s Grand Slam outfits are self-expression. Her tennis is getting loud too
entry.content: THE ALL ENGLAND CLUB, London — On Naomi Osaka’s way to turning the tennis court into a high-fashion runway as no one ever has before, she has once again become a truly excellent player — especially in places where she never thought that would happen. Osaka, the trailblazing, 28-year-old, four-time Grand Slam champion will play in the second week of Wimbledon for the first time Sunday. She has blitzed through her first three matches without losing a set, losing more than three games in a set just

entry.title: Eight people shot in Coney Island, including four children, NYPD says
entry.content: At least eight people, including four children, were shot late Saturday night in Brooklyn’s Coney Island, leaving one woman in critical condition.

entry.title: Where to watch Brazil vs. Norway live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 16 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Brazil vs. Norway World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Can USA beat Belgium? How the USMNT can win their World Cup Round of 16 match vs. Red Devils
entry.content: The United States have reached a pivotal moment in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, having advanced to the Round of 16 where they will face Belgium in Seattle on Monday.

entry.title: Mexico vs. England projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Round of 16 game at the Azteca
entry.content: The projected lineups for a potentially famous World Cup match at the Azteca in Mexico City.

entry.title: Cricket match abandoned after bull storms pitch
entry.content: The bull's owner brought along a cow to entice it off the Burnopfield playing grounds to no avail.

entry.title: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
entry.content: Thomas Tuchel dismisses concerns over England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been "nicer than I expected" and that home fans are "friendly and respectful".

entry.title: 🥐Oyarzabal and Barça, Klopp and Germany... the day's 5️⃣ stories
entry.content: It’s not all about the World Cup—there have also been other news stories worth highlighting.Oyarzabal is not leaving San SebastiánIn a recent interview, the Real Sociedad captain admitted that he...

entry.title: Gunter tight-lipped on future after Wales' U19s exit
entry.content: Head coach Chris Gunter is disappointed after Wales bow out of Uefa Men's Under-19 Championship but refuses to be drawn on his own future.

entry.title: Gavi backs Julian Alvarez move to Barcelona: ‘I’d love him to be with us’
entry.content: Barcelona midfielder Gavi has admitted he would love to see Julian Alvarez join the club, adding his voice to the growing speculation surrounding the Argentine striker’s future.Speaking in an interv...

entry.title: Nathan Ake leaves Man City to join Fenerbahce
entry.content: Fenerbahce have completed the signing of Nathan Ake from Manchester City in a deal worth up to £8.5m.The Turkish club have paid around £7m upfront, with the remainder dependent on add-ons. It brings...

entry.title: One city, many flags: London's World Cup loyalties
entry.content: How do Londoners with split loyalties decide which team to support at the World Cup?

entry.title: (Video) Hugo Ekitike grinds through his injury recovery with visit to California-based physio
entry.content: Hugo Ekitike has been seen stepping up his recovery from a long-term Achilles injury with a visit to a California-based physiotherapist.Just under three months ago, the Liverpool striker had a terrifi...

entry.title: Trump Delivers Address on America’s 250th Birthday: ‘Nobody Can Be Like Us’
entry.content: The speech was delayed by the threat of thunderstorms after attendees during the day grappled with extreme heat.

entry.title: CBS' "The Great American Block Party 250" July 4 special
entry.content: CBS hosts a primetime special celebrating America's 250th birthday on Saturday, July 4, with exclusive performances and the largest fireworks show in history.

entry.title: Rep. Nancy Pelosi's husband suspected in Napa County hit-and-run
entry.content: Paul Pelosi, the husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, is suspected of crashing into a parked car and driving away from the scene Friday afternoon in Northern California.

entry.title: Heat and severe storms damper July 4th celebrations, leave thousands without power
entry.content: While millions of Americans across the Northeast experienced record-setting temperatures, thunderstorms in the Midwest downed trees, ruptured power lines and made transportation treacherous.

entry.title: Relay for America runs flag from San Francisco to D.C. in message of unity
entry.content: Relay for America ran the American flag from San Francisco to Washington, D.C., this week to commemorate America's 250th birthday. They did it nonstop for 20 days and nights for more than 3,000 miles on a mission of unity heading to the Fourth of July. Tony Dokoupil has the story.

entry.title: What we know about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding so far
entry.content: The vows have been exchanged, the party is over, and slowly, details are emerging about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. Lilia Luciano reports.

entry.title: Cuba’s Vast Surveillance Network Preserves the Communist Party’s Grip on Power
entry.content: The government’s security apparatus has staved off collapse under U.S. pressure, monitoring Cubans in their homes, on the job and even at movie theaters.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
We can’t change the wind, but we can set the sails differently.
Lucky Numbers: 22, 91, 29, 34, 84, 7

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: When traveling, keep a bar of scented soap in the same compartment as your dirty laundry. It will keep your clothes smelling clean.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: The electric chair was invented by a dentist.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — A.A. Milne
entry.content: “One of the advantages of being disorganized is that one is always having surprising discoveries.” — A.A. Milne

entry.title: Trump offers to help Putin find deal with Ukraine, also speaks with Zelenskiy
entry.content: Trump offers to help Putin find deal with Ukraine, also speaks with Zelenskiy

entry.title: How Rogue Nations Are Using Cryptocurrencies to Evade Sanctions
entry.content: Blacklisted entities handled $100 billion in crypto in 2025, financing terrorism and weapons.

entry.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says he spoke to Trump, calls for 'American resolve' to help end war
entry.content: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says he spoke to Trump, calls for 'American resolve' to help end war

entry.title: Female American rower completes record-breaking solo journey
entry.content: A Grand Canyon river rafting guide who aimed to become the first American woman to row across the mid-Pacific solo has completed a record-breaking journey from California to Hawaii

entry.title: How your smartwatch and AI might detect early signs of illness
entry.content: Wearables are best at noticing breaks from your body's usual patterns. Those outliers can hint that something warrants further investigation with your doctor.

entry.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
entry.content: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

entry.title: Joey Chestnut scarfs down most July Fourth hot dogs again
entry.content: The champion reigned supreme as Joey Chestnut staved off a horde of hungry challengers at the annual Nathan's Famous International Hot Dog Eating Contest on New York's Coney Island.

entry.title: Searing heat and storms mar holiday with 3 children dead in Wisconsin and utility outages widespread
entry.content: Three children who died when a boat capsized in Geneva Lake during a Wisconsin storm were wearing life vests, authorities said as the nation assessed damage from storms and a heat wave that marred the July Fourth holiday, leaving hundreds of thousands of utility customers without power.

entry.title: Tesla expands robotaxi service to small section of Miami
entry.content: The company's robotaxi roadmap mentions future expansions to Orlando and Tampa.

entry.title: Largest reported naval gathering in U.S. history sails into New York Harbor for America's 250th
entry.content: Vice President J.D. Vance joined the International Naval Review 250 on Independence Day at the Port of New York and New Jersey to commemorate America's semiquincentennial.

entry.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (July 5)
entry.content: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

entry.title: Saturday Sessions: Punch Brothers perform "New Bike"
entry.content: Bluegrass band Punch Brothers was formed by mandolinist Chris Thile in 2006. Their upcoming all-instrumental album, "The Unsung Adventures of Punch Brothers," will be released on July 24. Here's Punch Brothers performing "New Bike."

entry.title: Saturday Sessions: Punch Brothers perform "This Land Is Your Land"
entry.content: Bluegrass band Punch Brothers was formed by mandolinist Chris Thile in 2006. In celebration of the Fourth of July, here's Punch Brothers performing their cover of Woody Guthrie's classic song, "This Land Is Your Land."

entry.title: Who were the last residents of Liberty Island?
entry.content: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most recognized works of art in the world, symbolizing American progress and the welcoming promise of immigration. Lady Liberty stands on a 15-acre island, now crowded by tourists — but once, a small group of residents called the island their home.

entry.title: Massive Crowds Gather in Tehran for Khamenei’s Six-Day Funeral
entry.content: Authorities predict 20 million people will attend six days of ceremonies to mourn the supreme leader killed in the war with Israel and the U.S.

entry.title: Serena Williams withdraws from Wimbledon doubles match with sister Venus
entry.content: Serena Williams cited a knee injury behind her decision to withdraw from a doubles match at Wimbledon.

entry.title: Flying "Old Glory" and the history of America's most iconic flags
entry.content: The iconic American flag is recognized around the world, representing the ideals and image of the nation. Author and photographer Roland Miller joins "CBS Saturday Mornings" to showcase some of the most famous flag moments in American history.

entry.title: NASA mission to rescue the falling Swift observatory has launched
entry.content: NASA has made contact with LINK, the robotic spacecraft made for the Swift Boost mission.

entry.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
entry.content: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

entry.title: Tesla driver charged with manslaughter for Texas crash that killed a woman in her home
entry.content: The incident is also being investigated by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

entry.title: NYC bar owner says Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding closures cost him thousands in lost business
entry.content: An NYC bar owner says the street closures surrounding Taylor Swift's and Travis Kelce's wedding week cost his business thousands of dollars after the NYPD implemented extensive street closures around Madison Square Garden for the couple's nuptials.

entry.title: Stock Funds Rallied 17.1% in a Quarter That Made Investors’ Heads Spin
entry.content: An IPO rocket, a war rally and a new Fed gave investors plenty to think about. Plus: Our latest Financial Flashback, to the options-dating scandal 20 years ago.

entry.title: Only these iPhone models are getting the new Siri AI this fall
entry.content: Some Apple devices are about to get much more intelligent, while others are getting left behind.

entry.title: Serena Williams withdraws from Wimbledon doubles competition after knee injury
entry.content: Serena Williams is withdrawing from Wimbledon doubles competition after injuring her knee at the tournament earlier this week.

entry.title: ‘The situation is terrible’: aid workers on life in Sudanese city pummelled by drone strikes
entry.content: El Obeid becomes key battleground in war between Sudan’s armed forces and their paramilitary enemies, the RSFFatima has lost count of the number of drone attacks on the besieged city of El Obeid in Sudan, but said the attacks this past weekend were the most violent so far.The drones hit schools and fuel stations, killing more than 20 people, including students, she said. “Over the past few months, seeing 40 or 45 drones is the norm. You can literally count them,” said the aid volunteer, whose name has been changed for fear of retribution. Continue reading...

entry.title: With Trump in His Corner, Erdogan Gets an Easier Ride From NATO Partners
entry.content: A rapport between the two leaders is helping to mute criticism of the Turkish president and cementing his nation’s role ahead of a summit in Ankara.

entry.title: Week-long heatwave due in England with 34C peak in south-east
entry.content: Heat health alerts in place in most regions of England from Sunday to Saturday with mercury also rising in WalesAnother heatwave is on the way across parts of the UK with peak temperatures of 34C forecast.Temperatures in the south of England could reach 28C on Saturday, according to the Met Office. Continue reading...

entry.title: Happy 250th, America! The Nation Celebrates a Milestone Weekend
entry.content: Cities pulled out all the stops despite a scorching heat wave, with historic re-enactments, concerts and dazzling fireworks.

entry.title: Clinton, Bush, Obama, Biden Share Message for America at 250
entry.content: Former Presidents Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, Barack Obama and Joe Biden sit down with TODAY’s Jenna Bush Hager and share a message of hope and optimism as Americans celebrate the country’s 250th anniversary.

entry.title: Router brands could be misleading you with that Wi-Fi 7 label
entry.content: Wi-Fi standards remain as confusing as ever.

entry.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
entry.content: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.

entry.title: Rescue mission launches to save NASA telescope that's falling back to Earth
entry.content: A three-armed spacecraft rocketed into orbit Friday to rescue a NASA telescope that's in danger of crashing back to Earth.

entry.title: 2 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Just Got Kicked Out of the S&P 500. Is Either a Buy Now?
entry.content: 2 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Just Got Kicked Out of the S&P 500. Is Either a Buy Now?

entry.title: Mourners chant for revenge as dayslong funeral of Iran's slain leader begins
entry.content: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was put on display in Tehran with millions expected to attend his dayslong funeral.

entry.title: 3 AI Data Center Power Stocks to Buy in July
entry.content: 3 AI Data Center Power Stocks to Buy in July

entry.title: July 4th celebrations mark America's 250th birthday. Follow live updates.
entry.content: Americans are celebrating 250 years of independence this Fourth of July with events including the largest fireworks display in history.

entry.title: 1 symptom leads to dad's cancer diagnosis: "I was like, 'Wait, what?'"
entry.content: Eric Dillon thought the pain in his shoulder was a minor injury. It took two years to get the real answer.

entry.title: Family-owned company prepares to put on the largest fireworks display in history
entry.content: When the sun goes down on Independence Day, the skies of Washington, D.C., are expected to fill with a record-setting 850,000 individual fireworks for a 40-minute spectacle like no one has seen before.

entry.title: Midjourney wants the Hollywood studios that sued it to show the court how they use AI
entry.content: Midjourney is asking the court to get Disney, Warner Bros. and Universal to submit information on their AI use.

entry.title: Trump warns of "communist menace" in speech at Mount Rushmore
entry.content: The president kicked off America's 250th anniversary celebrations with a speech at Mount Rushmore where he warned of a resurgence in communism.

entry.title: 6 presidential speeches that shaped American history
entry.content: These six presidential speeches are some that have most reverberated through the ages, and whose impacts are still felt today.

entry.title: How the World Became Obsessed With the American Cowboy
entry.content: Watch how the cowboy became one of America’s most enduring cultural exports, from Oklahoma all the way to Tokyo.

entry.title: Wars Are Blurring Lines Between Corporate and National Security
entry.content: Businesses and governments are struggling to determine who will shoulder the costs of protecting critical infrastructure.

entry.title: 3 dead and others rescued after boat capsizes on Wisconsin lake amid storms
entry.content: Three people died and seven others were rescued after a boat capsized on a Wisconsin lake during a strong storm

entry.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and how to watch
entry.content: With 104 World Cup games being played in the U.S., Canada and Mexico, it's like "a Super Bowl every single day for five weeks," U.S. team captain Tim Ream told CBS News.

entry.title: 36-54 Chart
entry.content: Then again, they might not be Giants.

entry.title: Draymond Green believes the Los Angeles Lakers will regret letting LeBron James go
entry.content: The Lakers have parted ways with LeBron James after eight years, and Draymond Green believes it's a move they will regret.

entry.title: Trent Grisham makes smashing return to Yankees lineup, losing streak ends
entry.content: The Bombers put a seven-game skid to bed, and Grisham played a key role in his first game back.

entry.title: Former Ohio State hockey goalie signed to 3-year contract extension
entry.content: Former Ohio State goalie Jakub Dobes was signed to a three-year contact extesdion by the Montreal Candiens.

entry.title: Yankees 5, Twins 2: When it rains, it snores
entry.content: Post rain delay, the Twins quickly surrender the lead and never really give you hope again; you know this story already.

entry.title: Matchday: Oakland Roots SC at New Mexico United
entry.content: Saturday When: 7:25 p.m. Where: Isotopes Park, 1601 Avenida Cesar Chavez SE TV/streaming/radio: New Mexico 50/ESPN+/FM-101.7 Records: Oakland Roots SC (5-3-6), New Mexico United (5-4-3) The series: Oakland leads 4-3-3. And we’re back. Well, New Mexico United is anyway. After a two-week break, the club returns to USL Championship play on Saturday against Oakland Roots SC. And that means things ...

entry.title: Mountain West launches subscription-based streaming platform for game, team-specific content
entry.content: The Mountain West conference this week launched its new "direct-to-consumer" digital subscriptions platform called MW+. While the days of getting all the conference-hosted games and events for free online at the Mountain West's website are over, the new app-based subscription comes with higher production standards for all conference members and revenue generating options for the specific ...

entry.title: Knicks prepared to battle Lakers for $30 million Nuggets veteran center
entry.content: The New York Knicks may pursue a 6-foot-11 Denver Nuggets big man.

entry.title: What World Cup? Italians Are Having the Worst Summer Ever.
entry.content: While the rest of the world revels in the tournament, Italians are purposefully ignoring it.
